strategy: He resists Myth 50% and Death 25%, and takes +20% from Storm and Life. Hit with Storm or Life.
His Grendel minions buff and heal him: Ransacker Tower Shields him, Cracknail Dragonblades him, Scavenger Sprites him, every 3 rounds. Expect him to be shielded and bladed.

Killing minions triggers counters: defeating the Ransacker or Scavenger gives him Blinding Light next round (accuracy debuff on you); defeating the Cracknail gives him an enhanced Humongofrog (AoE). Bring accuracy so Blinding Light does not fizzle your hit.
The cleanest line is a Storm or Life AoE that drops the minions and Tyrfing together, rather than picking them off one at a time and eating each counter.
Blade up and land one big AoE.
cheatNotes: He cheat-casts based on which minion dies, so kill order changes what he throws back. Prefer an AoE that clears everything at once.
Killing the Ransacker or Scavenger gives him Blinding Light next round, lowering your accuracy. Bring accuracy or hit before it lands.
Killing the Cracknail gives him an enhanced Humongofrog AoE next round. Be ready to heal it.
Every 3 rounds his minions buff him. Expect stacked shields and blades on Tyrfing.
The Ransacker Tower Shields him (-55%) from Round 1. Punch through or strip it.
The Cracknail Dragonblades him (+35%) from Round 2, raising his hits.
The Scavenger Sprites him for healing from Round 3. Pressure him faster than the heals.
